title: Cobblemon Fun Modpack
description: An exciting new cobblemon journey! (For the Cobblemon Fun Minecraft Server).
body:
A simple modpack focused around cobblemon, which has enhanced building and overhauled enchantments. This modpack works best with multiplayer as it includes [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) and [Music Sync](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-sync).

This is a modpack designed for the Cobblemon Fun minecraft server. It contains various furniture mods, QoL, and game changing mods like [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement).

It removes any stress from minecraft with mods such as [Keep Some Inventory](https://modrinth.com/mod/keep-some-inventory), [TorchMaster](https://modrinth.com/mod/torchmaster), and [Visible Traders](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-traders), and enhances late game with [Customizable Elytra](https://modrinth.com/mod/customizable-elytra), [Respawnable Pets](https://modrinth.com/mod/respawnable-pets) and [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts).
